description: A layered no-bake trifle with angel food cake, pudding, strawberries, bananas, and Cool Whip.
steps: Add the pudding mix and milk to a mixing bowl. Whisk for 2 minutes. Set aside to let it thicken.
Cut the angel food cake into 1" pieces.
Layer the ingredients in a trifle bowl. Start with angel food cake, strawberries and bananas. Add half of the pudding mixture in an even layer.
Repeat a second time – angel food cake, strawberries, bananas and pudding.
Spread the Cool Whip in a nice even layer.
